_meta.purpose: AI vision classification of LOGH VII portraits. ATTRIBUTES are reliable; IDENTITY (name) is NOT resolvable from current decode due to global-index misalignment.
_meta.attribute_status: RELIABLE — pass1 validated 0 sex/faction conflicts vs atlas code; full pool covered.
_meta.identity_status: BLOCKED — dumpall global face-number index is misaligned to art (proven: dumpall/0085!=canon Schenkopp, dumpall/0206!=canon Yang, dumpall/0209 not blond Reinhard). Only 2 identities are image-confirmed (pixel-match). Stamping the official 12 face-number names onto decoded art is UNSAFE until tcf.hed indexing is correctly reverse-engineered.
_meta.index_check_evidence: review/INDEXCHECK.png; hash idx#85!=Schenkopp, idx#206!=Yang both False-match.
